# OPTUM GX Documentation

> Welcome to the OPTUM GX knowledge base.

- [OPTUM GX Documentation](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/index.md): OPTUM GX Documentation
- [OPTUM GX Python](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/index.md): Extend, automate, and customize your geotechnical workflows with Python in OPTUM GX.

## Materials

- [1 Notation](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/materials/1-notation.md): In this section, a number of frequently used quantities are defined.
- [2 Elasticity](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/materials/2-elasticity.md): For elastic materials, the strains and effective stresses are related in a one-to-one manner — that is, the strains generated through loading along one stress path will be recovered when unloading along the same stress path.
- [3 Hydraulic Models](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/materials/3-hydraulic-models.md): Variably saturated flow through a deforming porous medium can be described by the mass balance equation:
- [4 Mohr-Coulomb](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/materials/4-mohr-coulomb.md): The Mohr-Coulomb is the most basic model capable of reproducing the key features of soils. While more complex models in principle offer the possibility of
- [5 Tresca](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/materials/5-tresca.md): The Tresca model is essentially a special case of the Mohr-Coulomb model where the cohesion is set equal to the undrained shear strength, c'=c_u, the
- [6 MC Engineering](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/materials/6-mc-engineering.md): The Mohr-Coulomb and Tresca models both have their advantages and limitations. Under drained conditions, the Mohr-Coulomb model produces results that generally accepted and that have a transparent relation to the input parameters (E,\nu,c',\phi').
- [7 Drucker Prager](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/materials/7-drucker-prager.md): The Drucker-Prager material is very similar to the Mohr-Coulomb material but uses slightly different expressions for the yield and plastic potential function.
- [8 Modified Cam Clay](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/materials/8-modified-cam-clay.md): The critical state models developed by Roscoe and his co-workers (Roscoe and Burland 1968; Schofield and Wroth 1968) in the 1960s have been widely applied in geomechanics and form the basis of many subsequent models.

## Python

### Introduction

- [Introduction](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/introduction/index.md): The OPTUM GX Python interface enables straightforward scripting control of geotechnical models, analyses, and results.
- [Generate Project Python Code](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/introduction/generate-project-python-code.md): Optum GX has a built-in feature to translate the input made in the user interface, directly to the corresponding Python code. This makes it easy to discover the functionality of python functions and convert your existing models to parametric python code.

### Setting Up IDE

- [Python Scripting with Spyder](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/setting-up-ide/spyder.md): Download and install the Spyder IDE from the official website: https://www.spyder-ide.org/download
- [Python Scripting with Visual Studio Code](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/setting-up-ide/vs-code.md): Download and install the Visual Studio Code (VS Code) from https://code.visualstudio.com

### Functions

#### Application

##### Operations

- [create_project](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/application/operations/create_project.md): Create project.
- [get_current_project](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/application/operations/get_current_project.md): Get current project.
- [open_project](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/application/operations/open_project.md): Open GX project.
- [save_project](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/application/operations/save_project.md): Save current project
- [write_step](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/application/operations/write_step.md): Write step

#### Project

##### Analysis

- [get_current_result_set](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/analysis/get_current_result_set.md): Get data of the currently plotted result.
- [run_analysis](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/analysis/run_analysis.md): Run analysis
- [run_analysis_async](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/analysis/run_analysis_async.md): Start the analysis without blocking and return a progress handle.

##### Geometry

- [create_csys_2d](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/geometry/create_csys_2d.md): Create two-dimensional coordinate system.
- [create_csys_3d](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/geometry/create_csys_3d.md): Create three-dimensional coordinate system.
- [get_csys](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/geometry/get_csys.md): Obtains a list of coordinate systems.

##### Materials

- [AUS](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/aus.md): Define an AUS material.
- [Beam](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/beam.md): Define a beam material
- [Connector](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/connector.md): Define a Connector material.
- [DruckerPrager](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/druckerprager.md): Define a Drucker-Prager material.
- [FlatPlateConcrete](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/flatplateconcrete.md): Define a Flat Plate Concrete material.
- [GeneralPlate](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/generalplate.md): Define a General Plate material.
- [Geogrid](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/geogrid.md): Define a Geogrid material
- [get_material](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/get_material.md): Get material(s) from the current project.
- [HardeningSoil](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/hardeningsoil.md): Define a Hardeing Soil material.
- [HMC](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/hmc.md): Define a Hardening Mohr-Coulomb material.
- [HoekBrown](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/hoekbrown.md): Define a Hoek-Brown material.
- [LinearElastic](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/linearelastic.md): Define a Linear Elastic material.
- [ModifiedCamClay](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/modifiedcamclay.md): Define a Modified Cam Clay material.
- [MohrCoulomb](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/mohrcoulomb.md): Define a Mohr-Coulomb material.
- [MohrCoulombEngineering](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/mohrcoulombengineering.md): Define a Mohr-Coulomb Engineering material.
- [MultiMohrCoulomb](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/multimohrcoulomb.md): Define a Multi Mohr-Coulomb material.
- [NailRow](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/nailrow.md): Define a Nail Row material.
- [NGIADP](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/ngiadp.md): Define a NGI-ADP material.
- [PileRow](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/pilerow.md): Define a Pile Row material.
- [ReinforcedConcrete](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/reinforcedconcrete.md): Creates a ReinforcedConcrete material.
- [Rigid](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/rigid.md): Define a Rigid material.
- [RigidBeam](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/rigidbeam.md): Define a rigid beam material
- [RigidPlate](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/rigidplate.md): Define a Rigid Plate material.
- [SheetPile](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/sheetpile.md): Define a Sheet Pile material.
- [Tresca](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/tresca.md): Define a Tresca material.
- [Water](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/materials/water.md): Define Water material.

##### Operations

- [create_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/operations/create_model.md): Create model in project
- [get_current_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/operations/get_current_model.md): Get current model.
- [get_current_stage](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/operations/get_current_stage.md): Get current stage.
- [get_file_path](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/operations/get_file_path.md): Get the full path of the currently opened project file.
- [get_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/operations/get_model.md): Get model or models by name.
- [get_python_code](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/operations/get_python_code.md): Get generated Python code from the current session.
- [set_current_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/project/operations/set_current_model.md): Sets the current model.

#### Model

##### Analysis

- [from_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/analysis/from_model.md): Model from model property.
- [set_from_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/analysis/set_from_model.md): Set model from another model.

##### Features

- [add_connector](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/add_connector.md): Add a connector between two points.
- [add_fixed_end_anchor](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/add_fixed_end_anchor.md): Add fixed-end anchor at a point (without shape selection).
- [get_body_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_body_load.md): Get all volume (body) load features on the given shapes.
- [get_connector](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_connector.md): Get connector features on the given shapes.
- [get_features](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_features.md): Return all features as typed Remote objects.
- [get_fixed_end_anchor](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_fixed_end_anchor.md): Get fixed-end anchor features on the given shapes.
- [get_fixed_excess_pressure](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_fixed_excess_pressure.md): Get fixed excess pressure features on the given shapes.
- [get_fixed_head](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_fixed_head.md): Get fixed head features on the given shapes.
- [get_fixed_pressure](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_fixed_pressure.md): Get fixed pressure features on the given shapes.
- [get_geogrid](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_geogrid.md): Get geogrid features on the given shapes.
- [get_interface](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_interface.md): Get interface (shear joint) features on the given shapes.
- [get_line_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_line_load.md): Get all line load features on the given shapes.
- [get_line_moment](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_line_moment.md): Get all line moment features on the given shapes.
- [get_nailrow](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_nailrow.md): Get nail row features on the given shapes.
- [get_no_flow](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_no_flow.md): Get no-flow features on the given shapes.
- [get_pilerow](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_pilerow.md): Get pile row features on the given shapes.
- [get_plate](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_plate.md): Get plate (structural) features on the given shapes.
- [get_plate_bc](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_plate_bc.md): Get plate boundary condition features on the given shapes.
- [get_point_bc](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_point_bc.md): Get point boundary condition features on the given shapes.
- [get_point_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_point_load.md): Get all point load features on the given shapes.
- [get_point_moment](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_point_moment.md): Get all point moment features on the given shapes.
- [get_prestress](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_prestress.md): Get prestress features on the given shapes.
- [get_reaction_relaxation](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_reaction_relaxation.md): Get reaction relaxation features on the given shapes.
- [get_resultpoint](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_resultpoint.md): Get result point features on the given shapes.
- [get_seepage_face](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_seepage_face.md): Get seepage face features on the given shapes.
- [get_six_dof_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_six_dof_load.md): Get all six DOF loading features on the given shapes.
- [get_solid](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_solid.md): Get solid (material assignment) features on the given shapes.
- [get_support](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_support.md): Get support features on the given shapes.
- [get_surface_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_surface_load.md): Get all surface load features on the given shapes.
- [get_water_table](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/get_water_table.md): Get water table features on the given shapes.
- [remove_features](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/remove_features.md): Remove features by UUID or feature object.
- [set_body_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_body_load.md): Add body load.
- [set_connector](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_connector.md): Set connector material on existing connector shape.
- [set_fixed_end_anchor](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_fixed_end_anchor.md): Set fixed-end anchor from vertex.
- [set_fixed_excess_pressure](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_fixed_excess_pressure.md): Set fixed excess pressure boundary condition.
- [set_fixed_head](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_fixed_head.md): Set fixed head boundary condition.
- [set_fixed_pressure](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_fixed_pressure.md): Set fixed pressure boundary condition.
- [set_geogrid](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_geogrid.md): Set shape as geogrid.
- [set_hinge_2d](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_hinge_2d.md): Set hinge in 2D.
- [set_hinge_3d](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_hinge_3d.md): Set hinge in 3D.
- [set_interface](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_interface.md): Define interface (shear joint).
- [set_line_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_line_load.md): Add line load.
- [set_line_moment](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_line_moment.md): Add line moment (kNm/m).
- [set_nailrow](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_nailrow.md): Set shape as nail row.
- [set_no_flow](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_no_flow.md): Set shape to disallow flow.
- [set_pilerow](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_pilerow.md): Set shape as pile row.
- [set_plate](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_plate.md): Set shape material as plate.
- [set_plate_bc](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_plate_bc.md): Set plate boundary condition.
- [set_point_bc](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_point_bc.md): Set point boundary condition.
- [set_point_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_point_load.md): Add point load.
- [set_point_moment](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_point_moment.md): Add point moment (kNm).
- [set_prestress](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_prestress.md): Set prestress.
- [set_reaction_relaxation](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_reaction_relaxation.md): Set reaction relaxation.
- [set_resultpoint](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_resultpoint.md): Set points to record results.
- [set_seepage_face](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_seepage_face.md): Set shape to allow seepage.
- [set_six_dof_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_six_dof_load.md): Add six degree of freedom load.
- [set_solid](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_solid.md): Set shape material as solid.
- [set_standard_fixities](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_standard_fixities.md): Add standard support conditions to model.
- [set_support](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_support.md): Set support conditions to shapes.
- [set_surface_load](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_surface_load.md): Add surface load.
- [set_water_table](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/features/set_water_table.md): Define water table at shape.

##### Geometry

- [add_arc](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_arc.md): Draw an arc in 2D, using N line segments between two points and a midpoint.
- [add_box](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_box.md): Create a solid box in 3D between a start and end point.
- [add_circle](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_circle.md): Draw a circle in 2D, from center point and radius, using N line segments.
- [add_line](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_line.md): Add a line defined by two points.
- [add_lines](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_lines.md): Add line segments between consecutive points.
- [add_ncone](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_ncone.md): Draw a cone (or truncated cone) in 3D.
- [add_nprism](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_nprism.md): Draw a Nprism in 3D.
- [add_polygon](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_polygon.md): Add a polygon defined by a two-dimensional array of vertex points.
- [add_polygons](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_polygons.md): Add a list of polygons defined by an array of two-dimensional arrays of vertex points for each polygon.
- [add_polyline](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_polyline.md): Add a polyline defined by a list of points.
- [add_prism](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_prism.md): Draw a prism in 3D.
- [add_rectangle](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_rectangle.md): Create a rectangle in 2D between a start and end point.
- [add_sphere](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_sphere.md): Add a sphere from center point and radius, using N line segments.
- [add_vertex](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/add_vertex.md): Create a point in 2D or 3D.
- [copy](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/copy.md): Copy shapes.
- [delete_interior](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/delete_interior.md): Delete shapes and leave voids in their place.
- [delete_shapes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/delete_shapes.md): Delete shapes and their definition.
- [extrude](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/extrude.md): Extrude a shape.
- [extrude_2d_to_3d_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/extrude_2d_to_3d_model.md): Extrudes a 2D model to 3D.
- [extrude_along](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/extrude_along.md): Extrude faces along a path defined by a list of points.
- [get_extrude_to_3d](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/get_extrude_to_3d.md): Get extrude-to-3D settings for the given shapes.
- [mirror](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/mirror.md): Mirror shapes.
- [move](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/move.md): Move shapes.
- [polar_array](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/polar_array.md): Generate polar array of shapes.
- [rectangular_array](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/rectangular_array.md): Generate rectangular array of shapes.
- [revolve](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/revolve.md): Revolve shape around axis.
- [revolve_2d_to_3d_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/revolve_2d_to_3d_model.md): revolve 2D model to 3D.
- [rotate](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/rotate.md): rotate shapes.
- [scale](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/scale.md): Scale shapes.
- [set_extrude_to_3d](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/set_extrude_to_3d.md): Set extrude-to-3D settings on shapes.
- [set_vertex_position](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/set_vertex_position.md): Set new postion of vertex.
- [slice_3d_to_2d_model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/geometry/slice_3d_to_2d_model.md): Slide a 3D model to 2D.

##### Meshing

- [get_mesh_fan](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/meshing/get_mesh_fan.md): Get mesh fan features on the given shapes.
- [get_mesh_size](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/meshing/get_mesh_size.md): Get mesh size features on the given shapes.
- [set_mesh_fan](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/meshing/set_mesh_fan.md): Set mesh fan around vertex.
- [set_mesh_size](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/meshing/set_mesh_size.md): Set mesh size to shape.

##### Operations

- [disable_global_transparency](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/disable_global_transparency.md): Disable transparency on all shapes.
- [disable_transparency](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/disable_transparency.md): Disable transparency on shapes.
- [enable_transparency](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/enable_transparency.md): Enable transparency on shapes.
- [get_current_stage](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/get_current_stage.md): Obtain current stage.
- [get_stage](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/get_stage.md): Obtain a list of stages.
- [hide_shapes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/hide_shapes.md): Hide shapes from view.
- [model_type](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/model_type.md): Model type property.
- [set_current_stage](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/set_current_stage.md): Sets the current stage.
- [unhide_all_shapes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/unhide_all_shapes.md): Unhide all hidden shapes.
- [unhide_shapes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model/operations/unhide_shapes.md): Unhide previously hidden shapes.

#### Model and Stage

##### Analysis

- [get_analysis_properties](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/analysis/get_analysis_properties.md): Get analysis properties.
- [get_run_flag](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/analysis/get_run_flag.md): Get run flag for model or stage.
- [output](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/analysis/output.md): Analysis output.
- [set_analysis_properties](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/analysis/set_analysis_properties.md): Define analysis properties
- [set_run_flag](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/analysis/set_run_flag.md): Set run flag for model or stage.
- [set_solver_settings](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/analysis/set_solver_settings.md): Define solver settings.

##### Geometry

- [edges](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/edges.md): Get all edges in model.
- [faces](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/faces.md): Get all faces in model.
- [get_active_csys](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_active_csys.md): Obtains the active coordinate system.
- [get_selected_shapes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_selected_shapes.md): Return selected shapes in GUI.
- [get_shape_by_id](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_shape_by_id.md): Get shape by id.
- [get_shapes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_shapes.md): Get shapes in a model.
- [get_shapes_by_vertices](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_shapes_by_vertices.md): Get shapes bounded by vertices.
- [get_shared_edges](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_shared_edges.md): Obtain the shared edges between two lists of shapes.
- [get_shared_faces](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_shared_faces.md): Obtain the shared faces between two lists of shapes.
- [get_sub_shapes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_sub_shapes.md): Get subshapes in a model.
- [get_vertices](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/get_vertices.md): Get vertex from their coordinates.
- [select](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/select.md): Select geometric objects by point or bounding box.
- [set_active_csys](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/set_active_csys.md): Set the active coordinate system.
- [vertices](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/vertices.md): Get all vertices in model.
- [volumes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/geometry/volumes.md): Get all volumes in model.

##### Operations

- [clone](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/operations/clone.md): Clones the selected model.
- [create_stage](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/operations/create_stage.md): Creates a new stage.
- [delete](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/operations/delete.md): Delete model or stage.
- [redo](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/operations/redo.md): Redo last undone operation on this model.
- [undo](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/operations/undo.md): Undo last operation on this model.
- [zoom_all](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/model-and-stage/operations/zoom_all.md): Zoom to view all geometry.

#### Stage

##### Analysis

- [set_from_stage](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/stage/analysis/set_from_stage.md): Set stage from another stage in the same model.

##### Features

- [toggle_features](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/stage/features/toggle_features.md): Toggle features on/off.

##### Operations

- [create_stage](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/stage/operations/create_stage.md): Creates a new stage from this stage.
- [model](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/stage/operations/model.md): Stage origin model property.

#### Objects

##### Features

- [Connectors](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/connectors.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [ExtrudeTo3dSettings](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/extrudeto3dsettings.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [FixedEndAnchors](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/fixedendanchors.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [FixedExcessPressures](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/fixedexcesspressures.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [FixedHeads](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/fixedheads.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [FixedPressures](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/fixedpressures.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [Geogrids](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/geogrids.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [LineLoads](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/lineloads.md): Line load feature with remote API synchronization via IFeature.
- [LineMoments](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/linemoments.md): Line moment feature with remote API synchronization via IFeature.
- [MeshFans](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/meshfans.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [MeshSizes](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/meshsizes.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [NailRows](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/nailrows.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [NoFlows](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/noflows.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [PileRows](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/pilerows.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [PlateBcs](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/platebcs.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [Plates](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/plates.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [PointBcs](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/pointbcs.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [PointLoads](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/pointloads.md): Point load feature with remote API synchronization via IFeature.
- [PointMoments](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/pointmoments.md): Point moment feature with remote API synchronization via IFeature.
- [Prestresses](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/prestresses.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [ReactionRelaxations](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/reactionrelaxations.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [ResultPoints](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/resultpoints.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [SeepageFaces](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/seepagefaces.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [ShearJoints](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/shearjoints.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [SixDofLoadings](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/sixdofloadings.md): Six DOF loading feature with remote API synchronization via IFeature.
- [Solids](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/solids.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.
- [Supports](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/supports.md): Support boundary condition feature.
- [SurfaceLoads](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/surfaceloads.md): Surface load feature with remote API synchronization via IFeature.
- [VolumeLoads](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/volumeloads.md): Volume (body) load feature with remote API synchronization via IFeature.
- [WaterTables](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/features/watertables.md): No docstring yet — add one in source to populate this section.

##### Geometry

- [Shape](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/geometry/shape.md): A single geometric entity (vertex, edge, face or volume) within a model.
- [ShapeList](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/objects/geometry/shapelist.md): An ordered collection of Shape objects from a single stage.

#### Utilities

- [Utilities](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/utilities/index.md)
- [Gradient](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/utilities/gradient.md): Gradient data (zref, zgrad, value).
- [ParameterMap](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/utilities/parametermap.md): Map data (x, y, z, value).
- [Profile](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/utilities/profile.md): Profile data (depth, value).
- [Run OptumGX from Python](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/functions/utilities/run-gx-from-python.md): This article outlines a helper function that checks if an instance of OptumGX is running. If not, the application is started. The input parameters are set to the default, but may need to be altered to match the current machine.

### Examples

- [Examples](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/examples/index.md)
- [1. Shallow foundation](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/examples/example1_shallow_foundation.md): This example deals with the an eccentrically loaded foundation. The soil is saturated clay and the analysis is to be performed assuming undrained conditions.
- [3.  Settlement of strip footing on elastic soil](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/examples/example3_strip_footing.md): This example deals with a centrally loaded weightless rigid strip footing on an elastic soil. The footing and the soil are modeled using the default materials Rigid and Linear Elastic, respectively.
- [5. Footing on soil with user defined material data](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/examples/example5_parametric_cu.md): This example deals with user defined material parameter variation.
- [6. Slope stability - Long term](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/examples/example6_slope_stability_long_term.md): In this example we consider the stability of a layered slope.
- [10. Slope with pre-existing fault](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/examples/example10_slope_fault.md): In this example we consider the stability of slope with, and without, a fault line.
- [11. Stability of seismically loaded slope](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/python/examples/example11_loukidis_seismic.md): In this example we consider the stability of slope with pseudo-static seismic loading. The analytical solutions are shown in [Loukidis et al. (2003)][1].

## Utilities

- [Shortcuts](https://docs.optumce.com/optum-gx/utilities/shortcuts.md): A reference of keyboard and mouse shortcuts available in OPTUM GX.
